open_questions.question: How much comment and provenance detail should a future pretty-view retain by default?
open_questions.default_until_resolved: canonical storage stays comment-free; pretty-view may add only non-semantic annotations

open_questions.question: Should Rust remain importer-only in the MVP or grow into an active round-trip proof loop later?
open_questions.default_until_resolved: keep Rust importer-first and do not widen reconstruction or benchmark claims

open_questions.question: Should persistent lineage later absorb a module-level dependency signature in addition to normalized declarations?
open_questions.impact: identity semantics across larger multi-module imports
open_questions.default_until_resolved: keep lineage scoped to normalized module semantics only
